code_development.description: Correct implementation of paper's methods, models, losses, and baselines

training_loop.description: Training procedure, optimizer, scheduler, loss computation

execution.description: Code runs without errors; scripts produce outputs

runnable_scripts.description: Experiment scripts for each table/figure are runnable

configuration.description: All hyperparameters exposed in config files

result_match.description: Experimental results match paper claims within tolerance

main_results.description: Primary table/figure results match paper numbers

leaf_item_schema._comment: Schema reference — do not include in actual rubric items
leaf_item_schema.id: string — format: CD-001, EX-001, RM-001 (prefix by category)
leaf_item_schema.subcategory: model_implementation | data_pipeline | training_loop | baselines | runnable_scripts | configuration | documentation | main_results | ablation_results | baseline_comparisons
leaf_item_schema.description: Exactly what must be true for this item to pass (single, verifiable claim)
leaf_item_schema.weight: float between 0 and 1 (relative to sibling items in same subcategory)
leaf_item_schema.evidence_file: relative path to implementing file, or null
leaf_item_schema.evidence_line: line number in evidence_file, or null
leaf_item_schema.skip_reason: string explaining why item was skipped (proprietary data, etc.), or null
